programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: When flames tore through a Buffalo, New York home in 2018, the investigation revealed a toxic relationship and a hot-tempered arsonist, Frank Bredt, Jr. Now Bredt is talking about his crime from behind bars. In this episode of Interview With a Killer, host David Scott revisits the fire, the evidence, and the unraveling timeline - exposing a jilted lover hidden behind smoke and destruction and giving viewers an unfiltered look into the chilling death of an innocent mother.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In 2013, the small city of Weatherford, Texas was rocked by the brutal slaying of local son, JD Doss. The murder weapon? A pickaxe. The murderer? His close friend, 24-year-old Nicholas Camfield. In a shocking twist, Camfield not only killed his victim by repeatedly striking him in the head, he also mutilated, scalped, and defiled his body over the course of days. In one of David Scott's most shocking interviews, Camfield gives a glimpse inside his deranged, murderous mind.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In his first ever television interview, killer Thomas Gilbert, Jr. discusses the murder that shook New York's elite. The Princeton-educated Gilbert became a tabloid obsession when he shot his father after his $1,000 allowance was cut off. But in this unique installment of Interview With a Killer, Gilbert appears to be a far cry from his once golden upbringing. Host David Scott explores his long history of mental illness and the privileged pressure cooker that shaped his downfall.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: She's one of the most camera-friendly killers in true crime history.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Full 60-Minute 4K Nature Film ✨ Journey into one of the most magical landscapes on Earth — Plitvice Lakes National Park, Croatia’s crown jewel of cascading waterfalls, turquoise lakes, and lush alpine forests. This full-length 60-minute cinematic nature film invites you to relax and explore the mesmerizing beauty of Europe’s oldest and most breathtaking national park, filmed in stunning 4K Ultra HD. Follow the flow of crystal-clear water as it connects 16 terraced lakes through a labyrinth of waterfalls, travertine pools, and forest pathways — a symphony of nature captured in its purest form. 🎬 Presented by NatureStream.tv, creators of Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 1: Slovenia, this film is part of our global nature series designed to inspire calm, mindfulness, and appreciation for Earth’s beauty.

programme.title: Seasons of the Sierra
programme.desc: Experience the spectacular seasons of the Sierra Mountains in this 3 hour film. From vast swaths of colorful aspens to sparkling wildflower meadows, the "Seasons of the Sierra" showcases the stunning beauty of the Range of Light.

programme.title: Waterfall Relaxation
programme.desc: Unwind with the sights and sounds of a spectacular cascading waterfall in Northern California. Burney falls is a spring fed waterfall that has been referred to as the "eighth wonder of the world". This new release also features scenes from Manzanita Lake in Lassen National Park, a scenic high alpine lake with abundant bird life. Relaxing waterfall sounds and bird songs make this a wonderful escape from the pressures of daily life. {[TrailerUrl:https://vimeo.com/793652147]}

programme.title: Mountain Meadows
programme.desc: “Mountain Meadows” is a 2 hour nature film featuring wildflower blooms from California’s Table Mountain ecological preserve, along with meadows & lakes in the High Sierra mountains. Stunning drone footage shows the beauty of summer meadows in bloom from an aerial perspective. A relaxing instrumental soundtrack accompanies these uplifting visuals to bring you a wonderful immersion into nature's beauty.

programme.title: Hawaii, A Journey Through The Big Island
programme.desc: Experience Big Island bliss in the stunning 2 hour relaxing nature film. Soar above waterfalls that plunge into the Pacific, kick back with views of beach sunsets and slow motion waves, enjoy island palms in the gentle island breezes, and experience the Waipi'o valley paradise from above. Dazzling cinematography is accompanied by a relaxing soundtrack. Run time 2 hours.

programme.title: The Story of Brennan O’Neill
programme.desc: Brennan O’Neill’s rare combination of size, speed, and power has made him one of the most dominant forces in lacrosse. From prodigy to professional, his physical presence has reshaped the game. But as competition intensifies and defenses adjust, this feature explores how dominance is tested at the highest level, and asks one question: Is dominance enough?

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 18 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. On this episode, Mitch and the crew break down everything we've seen heading into the PLL and WLL All-Star Weekend. Who can stop Dylan Molloy and the California Redwoods? Do the Philadelphia Waterdogs have a pair of MVP candidates in CJ Kirst and Michael Sowers? We also welcome Boston Cannons rookie attackman Jack Regnery to uncover his journey from Division 3, as well as Dan Alexander to talk through some PLL and WLL All-Star Game trades from Polymarket.

programme.title: S1E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, and Nicholi Rogatkin, freestyle powerhouse, tackle the Downhill Challenge Medellín, the longest urban downhill race, with #HyperSmooth. Then join Gee, Rachel, and Dan Atherton, enduro and downhill champions, as they ride together through heart-pounding terrain. Speed, skill, and adrenaline collide in every unforgettable moment.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.title: S1E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.desc: In The Over-the-Hill Gang, a group of retired Texas Rangers prove they’ve still got what it takes when they reunite to clean up a crooked frontier town. Led by Walter Brennan, with Edgar Buchanan, Chill Wills, and Andy Devine along for the ride, these aging lawmen may be past their prime, but their courage, wit, and six-guns make them a force to be reckoned with. Blending lighthearted comedy with classic Western action, this made-for-TV favorite delivers laughs, heart, and a reminder that true heroes never hang up their spurs.
